vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque
Mounting flange ISO 9409
ESD-safe, particle-free joint seals
CNC + LPBF manufacturing

verify.rule: All required fields are present and valid.
Mass estimate is within expected range for the subsystem.
All P0 internal_feature_targets are represented in geometry_ops.
All interfaces have reciprocal connections with neighboring subsystems.
Critical joints have visible locking and preload evidence.
Boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat dissipation requirements.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling measures such as fans or liquid cooling.

risk.desc: Risk of mechanical failure due to high peak torque.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and ensure material selection is appropriate.

risk.desc: Cable entry grommet may not provide sufficient strain relief.
risk.mit: Design strain relief features around cable entry points.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions and use alignment tools.

risk.desc: Risk of ESD damage due to lack of proper shielding in cable harness.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable harnesses are properly shielded and grounded.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque

physics_paths.description: Payload force transfers through arm links to base plate
Heat from motor transferred to cooling fins for dissipation
Rotational motion from harmonic drive to motor
Power and control signals from controller to motor
Service access for cable entry and inspection

verification_focus.description: Check load distribution and stress concentration in base plate
Verify thermal management and heat dissipation through cooling fins
Ensure proper electrical connectivity and shielding of cable entry
Validate bolted interfaces and alignment during assembly

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion mismatch between aluminum and steel components.
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients or design with expansion joints.

risk.desc: Risk of cable harness damage due to repetitive motion.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief and slack loops at joint crossings.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interface geometry.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment tools and detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload on critical fasteners.
risk.mit: Use torque-controlled fastening tools and verify preload.

risk.desc: Risk of particle contamination during assembly.
risk.mit: Implement cleanroom assembly procedures and use ESD-safe materials.

physics_paths.description: Payload force transmitted through arm links to shoulder joint
Actuator torque applied to shoulder joint for motion control
Heat dissipation from actuator and bearing to ambient
Electrical and data cables routed through center bore to wrist module
Access for maintenance and inspection of shoulder joint

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat transfer from motor to heat sink.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic
physics_paths: Load path: Cable spine supports payload weight and dynamic forces
Flow path: Signal, power, pneumatic lines from base to wrist
Thermal path: Heat dissipation from cables and joints to ambient
Motion path: Flexibility to accommodate arm movement
Pressure path: Sealed cable channels prevent ingress of contaminants
Human/service access: Inspectable slack loops and harness paths
integration_opportunities: Cable spine can be routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Harnesses can be routed through slack loops at every joint
Strain relief geometry can be added to prevent cable damage
Cable clips can be used to secure the harness in place
Harness paths can be designed to avoid pinch points
Cable channels can be designed to protect cables from environmental damage

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual and tactile inspection for cable routing and strain relief

risk.mit: Include additional inspection ports or use transparent materials for the window.
